purpose: Detect and block merged bodies, fused limbs, shared torsos, duplicated skeletons, and ambiguous multi-character boundaries.

checks.description: Each expected character must have one primary person instance mask or bbox assignment.
Each character gets a separate skeleton id; skeletons cannot be merged into one torso or shared limb chain.
Detect impossible limb count or duplicated/missing arms/legs compared with character plan.
High overlap is allowed only with deliberate foreground/background occlusion and visible identity anchors.
Faces must map to bodies; extra faces are blocked unless background/decor role is declared.
Contact points must have separate silhouettes or planned occlusion; bodies cannot melt/fuse at contact areas.
